_citation.derivation: Merged DEDR-based Dravidian syllable LM (2293 bigrams) with clean Mahadevan 2003 Tamil-Brahmi LM (Phase-33 T3, 1128 bigrams). Blend: 70% DEDR weight + 30% clean TB weight for shared bigrams. Unique bigrams from each source added directly.
_citation.authors: Burrow, T. & Emeneau, M.B. (1984). A Dravidian Etymological Dictionary. Mahadevan, I. (2003). Early Tamil Epigraphy, Harvard Oriental Series 62.
